parameters.architecture: MHA (32 KV heads x 96 head_dim = 3072 KV dim)

key_finding: STRONG REPLICATION: Position-sweep decodability replicates on Phi-3.5-mini-Instruct (MHA). V|nums positive 20/20 bins (both layers). V|nums=0.233 at 2.5% (text reveals 0%). Peak V|nums=0.540 (p=0.003). Gap=70-85%. All 8/8 TRUE predictions confirmed, 0/4 FALSE. Cross-model position-sweep confirmed on 2nd family (GQA+MHA, Base+Instruct).
evidence_impact: Phase 2 natural_usage STRONG with cross-model position-sweep replication. Position-sweep decodability now established across 2 model families, 2 architectures, 2 training regimes. Combined with per-operation probing and WRRA on 2 families, Phase 2 evidence is comprehensive.
next_planned: Paper-ready 3-panel figure (Qwen + Phi + overlay). Or Mistral position-sweep (test the exception). Or layer-sweep heatmap on Phi.

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION decisive on Qwen, weak on Llama.

positional_dissociation.status: Complete. Head x position interaction is encoding-dependent.

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL: 8 angles. K spectral geometry uniform across heads. V spectral differentiates.

head_level_analysis.status: COMPLETE + SPECTRAL: Two-regime on Qwen (decisive), near-collapse on Llama.

natural_usage.status: STRONG: Position-sweep V|nums on 2 families (Qwen peak 0.50 p=0.01; Phi peak 0.54 p=0.003). Per-operation V|nums on 2 families. WRRA on 2 families. Paraphrase NULL for non-number tokens. 3 positive methodologies + 1 null, all cross-model.

cross_model_replication.status: STRONG: Phase 1 complete (4 families). Phase 2: position-sweep on 2 families (Qwen+Phi), per-operation probing on 2 families, WRRA on 2 families. Only gap: Mistral (where V|nums failed at = positions).
